== Notes for [[Item:Q115174|Q115174]] ==

"'''D. Sancha Mendes de Briteiros''' m.er de '''D. Egas Viegas de Penagate''' q Fundou o Mosteiro de Rendufe"

''in'' https://www.familysearch.org/tree/person/sources/GSS5-W6R

https://www.familysearch.org/memories/memory/202189391


'''NOTE: The "D." above is the abbreviation of Dona (Lady) and Dom (Lord) in Portuguese'''. Please have a look at NFP Gayo, which includes titles when relevant.

https://permalinkbnd.bnportugal.gov.pt/records/item/68939-nobiliario-de-familias-de-portugal


*

Bibliography

* Chapter Briteiros (§ 1 N 1 - 2 - NFP - Gayo).

* Linhagens Medievais Portuguesas II by José Augusto De Sotto Mayor Pizarro

https://archive.org/details/linhagens-medievais-portuguesas-ii-jose-augusto-de-sotto-mayor-pizarro/page/755/mode/2up?q=%22+Mendes+de+Briteiros%22


---------------------

/!\ time travel DUP loop of https://www.geni.com/people/Sancha-Mendes-de-Briteiros/6000000005811199001 (note: fixed)

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
